prerequisites: Admin access to your Marketo instance to create the integration and read its credentials.
A Marketo API-only user role and an API-only user dedicated to the integration.
A Marketo Custom Service (created under Admin > Integration > LaunchPoint) that exposes a Client ID and Client Secret for REST API access.
Your Marketo REST API endpoint (Base URL / Domain URL) from Admin > Integration > Web Services.
A start date marking the earliest point from which to replicate data.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 client credentials (Client ID and Client Secret)
authMethods.summary: Marketo's REST API uses 2-legged OAuth 2.0 with the client_credentials grant. The connector exchanges the client_id and client_secret (issued by your Marketo Custom Service) at the instance identity endpoint for a short-lived bearer access token (valid 3600 seconds). The domain_url identifies which Marketo instance to authenticate against. These three values map to the connector's secret fields: client_id, client_secret, and domain_url.

setupSteps.title: Create an API-only role and user in Marketo
setupSteps.body: In your Marketo Admin area, create an API-only user role and assign it to a dedicated API-only user for this integration. This isolates programmatic access from interactive user accounts.

setupSteps.title: Create a Custom Service to obtain client_id and client_secret
setupSteps.body: Go to Admin > Integration > LaunchPoint and create a new Custom Service of type 'Custom', associating it with your API-only user. Open 'View Details' on the service to reveal the Client ID and Client Secret. Enter these as the connector's client_id and client_secret fields.

setupSteps.title: Find and set the domain_url
setupSteps.body: Go to Admin > Integration > Web Services and copy the Endpoint URL shown under the REST API section. Remove the trailing /rest so the value looks like https://000-AAA-000.mktorest.com, then enter it as the connector's domain_url field.

setupSteps.title: Set the start_date
setupSteps.body: Provide a start_date marking the earliest point from which the connector should replicate data. Records created or updated before this date are not synced.
